videos.headline: Kyle McCord threads the needle for 2nd TD pass vs. Holy Cross
videos.description: Kyle McCord lasers a 23-yard touchdown pass to Darrell Gill Jr. to extend Syracuse's lead over Holy Cross.

videos.headline: Jayden Bellamy nabs pick-six for Syracuse
